description: AI enrichment data for master restaurant categories - indexed by restaurant category code

RCAT-CAFE.aiDescription: Cozy coffee shops with comfortable seating, perfect for working, studying, or catching up with friends over coffee and light bites.

RCAT-COFFEESHOP.aiDescription: Dedicated coffee establishments focused on quality coffee drinks. Great for coffee lovers seeking a quick caffeine fix.

RCAT-BEERGARDEN.aiDescription: Outdoor drinking spots with lively atmosphere, perfect for group gatherings, celebrations, and enjoying cold beer with spicy Lao food.

RCAT-BEERHOUSE.aiDescription: Beer-focused establishments with wide selections of draft and bottled beer. Social atmosphere for beer lovers.

RCAT-BAR.aiDescription: Cocktail bars and lounges with sophisticated atmosphere. Great for dates, after-work drinks, and cocktail enthusiasts.

RCAT-NIGHTCLUB.aiDescription: Late-night entertainment venues with music and dancing. The place for parties, celebrations, and nightlife adventures.

RCAT-KARAOKE.aiDescription: Karaoke entertainment venues with private rooms. Fun group activity for celebrations and bonding.

RCAT-RESTAURANT.aiDescription: Full-service restaurants with diverse menus. Comfortable dining for families, friends, and business meals.

RCAT-LAOFOOD.aiDescription: Traditional Lao cuisine restaurants. Experience authentic local flavors and cooking traditions.

RCAT-THAIFOOD.aiDescription: Thai cuisine restaurants with aromatic curries, spicy salads, and classic Thai dishes.

RCAT-CHINESEFOOD.aiDescription: Chinese restaurants with diverse regional cuisines, dim sum, and family-style dining options.

RCAT-JAPANESEFOOD.aiDescription: Japanese cuisine with sushi, ramen, and traditional dishes. Clean aesthetics and precise preparation.

RCAT-KOREANFOOD.aiDescription: Korean cuisine with BBQ, stews, and authentic Korean flavors. Interactive grilling experience.

RCAT-WESTERNFOOD.aiDescription: Western cuisine restaurants with steaks, pasta, and international favorites.

RCAT-VIETNAMESEFOOD.aiDescription: Vietnamese cuisine known for fresh flavors, pho, and healthy options.

RCAT-NOODLESHOP.aiDescription: Noodle soup specialists. Comforting, quick, and affordable meals perfect for any time.

RCAT-BBQ.aiDescription: BBQ restaurants with table grills. Social, interactive dining perfect for groups.

RCAT-GRILLHOUSE.aiDescription: Grill houses specializing in charcoal-grilled meats and seafood. Rustic and flavorful.

RCAT-HOTPOT.aiDescription: Hotpot restaurants for interactive cooking at your table. Perfect for cold days and group dining.

RCAT-SEAFOOD.aiDescription: Seafood restaurants with fresh catches and ocean flavors. Perfect for seafood lovers.

RCAT-DESSERT.aiDescription: Dessert shops and sweet cafes. Indulgent treats and creative sweet creations.

RCAT-BAKERY.aiDescription: Bakeries with fresh bread, pastries, and baked goods. The smell of fresh baking.

RCAT-BUBBLETEA.aiDescription: Bubble tea and milk tea shops. Trendy drinks with chewy pearls and endless customizations.

RCAT-STREETFOOD.aiDescription: Street food vendors with authentic local flavors. Affordable, quick, and full of character.

RCAT-FINEDINING.aiDescription: High-end dining with exceptional service and elegant atmosphere. For special occasions and fine experiences.

RCAT-FAMILYREST.aiDescription: Family-friendly restaurants with diverse menus and welcoming atmosphere for all ages.

RCAT-FASTFOOD.aiDescription: Fast food restaurants with quick service and familiar flavors. Convenient and consistent.

RCAT-HOTEL.aiDescription: Hotel restaurants with professional service and quality dining. Convenient for travelers and business guests.
